name: lottie
when_to_use: For playing pre-made Lottie/Bodymovin JSON animations: animated icons, illustrations, loading spinners, or any After Effects exported animation
import_instructions: import { Lottie } from '@remotion/lottie'; import animationData from './animation.json';
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT import Lottie JSON with static import if it's large — use fetch + useState pattern
MUST use @remotion/lottie Lottie component, NOT lottie-web directly (for frame sync)
remotion_integration_notes: @remotion/lottie automatically synchronizes Lottie playback to Remotion's frame clock. No manual timeline management needed.
